content.full_text:
June 17, 1991

Mr. Wayne Imberri  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807  

RE: Sponsored Committee Name

Dear Wayne:

This will confirm our telephone conversation on June 13, 1991. I had called on June 12, with my partner Peter Bagatelos, and advised you that there are three trade associations within the life and health insurance industries who will be providing nearly all of the funds for a proposed ballot measure committee, either directly or with funds derived from their member companies. In addition, the trade association representatives will jointly make decisions regarding the operation of the committee, including expenditures to be made.

You advised that the committee could use some type of industry or group description, which encompasses the three trade associations, as part of the name of the committee. I provided to you the following proposed name, which you indicated would be acceptable, as follows: "Consumer Health Insurance Coalition, Comprised of Health and Life Insurance Associations".

Thank you for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

Barry Fadem  
(PAC)

BF/smk  
health:6-17ltr
